name: Curried Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat each breast piece completely in flour.
2. Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the chicken pieces and brown lightly on all sides, turning occasionally until golden brown.
4. Remove the chicken with tongs and place it in an oven-safe baking dish.
5. Add the chopped onion and garlic to the skillet. Cook, stirring constantly, until the onion is golden yellow.
6. Stir in the curry powder, salt, ginger, cinnamon, and pepper. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
7. Pour in the chicken broth all at once and whisk quickly to combine into a smooth sauce.
8. Return the chicken pieces to the skillet, covering them with the sauce. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until cooked through, about 1 hour.
9. Carefully ladle the sauce off the chicken into a small saucepan over medium heat.
10. Stir in the lime juice and reduce the sauce slightly until it just coats the back of a spoon.
11. Serve the chicken warm on a bed of rice pilaf with some sauce drizzled over, and serve the remaining sauce separately.
YIELD: 6 servings
